title: [DEVICE] TS0601 MOES CO detector

diagComments.excerpt: **Status:** MOES CO detector (TS0601 Tuya EF00) requires specialized DataPoint parsing. Will add support in v4.9.335. Device uses cluster 0xEF00 and needs DP mapping for CO detection. Tracking for implementation.

SUPPORTED in v5.1.0

MOES CO detector (TS0601) supported.

**Location:** drivers/gas_detector and drivers/gas_sensor

CO detection uses standard Tuya DP protocol (DP 1 for alarm state).
